dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics - package dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics
 
DiagnosticCheck - Interface in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics
A single runtime diagnostic check.
DiagnosticContext - Interface in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics
Context exposed to diagnostic checks.
DiagnosticMode - Enum Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics
Execution mode for runtime diagnostics.
DiagnosticRegistry - Interface in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics
Mutable registry of available runtime checks.
DiagnosticReport - Record Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics
Aggregated runtime diagnostics report.
DiagnosticReport(String, DiagnosticMode, Instant, Duration, List<DiagnosticResult>) - Constructor for record class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.DiagnosticReport
 
DiagnosticReport(String, DiagnosticMode, Instant, Duration, Map<String, Object>, List<DiagnosticResult>) - Constructor for record class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.DiagnosticReport
Creates a normalized report.
DiagnosticReports - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics
Rendering and export helpers for diagnostics reports.
DiagnosticResult - Record Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics
Result of a single diagnostic check.
DiagnosticResult(String, String, DiagnosticStatus, DiagnosticSeverity, String, Duration, Map<String, Object>, Throwable) - Constructor for record class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.DiagnosticResult
Creates a normalized result record.
DiagnosticRunRequest - Record Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics
Runtime diagnostics execution options.
DiagnosticRunRequest(DiagnosticMode, boolean, Duration, Predicate<DiagnosticCheck>) - Constructor for record class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.DiagnosticRunRequest
Creates a normalized run request.
DiagnosticsCommandSupport - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics
Reusable diagnostics subcommand helper.
DiagnosticSeverity - Enum Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics
Importance of a check when it fails.
DiagnosticsService - Interface in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics
Service for executing and exporting runtime diagnostics.
DiagnosticsSupport - Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics
Factory and runtime wiring helpers for diagnostics.
DiagnosticStatus - Enum Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics
Outcome of a diagnostic check.
DiagnosticSuiteName - Record Class in dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics
Typed diagnostics suite argument used by command parsers and suggestions.

Creates an instance of a DiagnosticSuiteName record class.

Installs the default diagnostics service and built-in checks into a runtime.

Installs the default diagnostics service and lets callers register custom checks.

STANDARD - Enum constant in enum class dev.ua.theroer.magicutils.diagnostics.DiagnosticMode
